purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Li Tang multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic chitin, old iron, insect-wax, blackstone, snowline frost, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The locked Suming/Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun emblem may appear only as a small physical plaque, wax seal, carapace brand, or military tag copied from the established design language, never as a new insect logo, banner, or large redesigned badge.
must_have: Li Tang must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid, with a stronger semi-anthropomorphic command face than v01
2.4 to 2.7 meter in-world scale must read through towering proportions

triangular mantis-derived command head, readable brow ridge, nose-like chitin ridge, paired cheek-plate planes, narrow jaw armor, dark compound eyes near human eye positions, bone-white mandible guard, antenna roots, broad black-green carapace, reverse-jointed legs, and folding forearm blades must all be visible
costume system is old iron harness, dark-green command belt, bone-white insect-wax seal strips, black short mantle, short spear, and iron gate command token
three states must preserve one continuous body identity
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: human general, humanoid warrior, man in black-green armor, armored human, helmeted soldier, knight armor, samurai armor, martial arts villain, pure unreadable insect monster head, ordinary mantis monster face, rank-and-file bug soldier face, fully human face, ordinary human face, human skin, human eyes with sclera or iris, human lips, human teeth, human nostrils, human hair, human boots, full human robe, complete human cloak, broad human shoulders under armor, handheld dual swords replacing blade limbs, mecha insect, cyberpunk, sci-fi armor, generic monster, gore, bloody horror, giant new logo, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect crest, large banner badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, over-saturated game art, high-magic aura, spell circle

input_images.role: locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference; use only as small physical rank plaque or wax seal, do not redesign
locked symbol system reference for institutional plaque, wax seal, carapace brand, and military tag logic
insect-wax, bone-white, membrane, and institutional material reference
border-wall blackstone, old iron, snowline, and frost material reference

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Li Tang from the series Severed Homeland. Use the visible project references for low-magic eastern epic style, Suming/Qingming institutional materials, the locked white-wing-over-black-sun emblem, black-green chitin, old iron, insect-wax, blackstone, and snowline frost. Li Tang is a high-ranking lower-caste Suming combat insect commander, not a human. The v02 target is to increase facial anthropomorphism so the commander face can read judgment, command, and anger in close-up, while locking all species traits to mantis-insect anatomy. He must be obviously non-human and non-humanoid: 2.4 to 2.7 meter in-world scale, broad heavy chest and back carapace, forward-leaning predatory torso, compact waist, long reverse-jointed legs, clawed feet, triangular mantis-derived command head, stronger semi-anthropomorphic military-caste facial structure, compressed readable brow ridge, central nose-like chitin ridge, paired cheek-plate expression planes, narrow jaw armor, narrow dark compound eyes placed near human eye positions, bone-white mandible guard as a locked military jaw-plate, visible antenna roots, triangular forehead plate, carapace cheeks, and dark soft neck membrane. He has no sclera, iris, normal pupils, human skin, human hair, lips, teeth, human nostrils, human boots, fully human face, or human armor suit. The face should be more command-readable than a rank-and-file insect soldier and more anthropomorphic than the current v01 mantis head, while still unmistakably insectoid. The board shows the same continuous insect identity in three full-body states: 1) Hanwubao command state, blades folded into forearm carapace grooves, controlled stillness, black-green shoulder and chest carapace, old iron harness across the body, dark-green command belt, bone-white insect-wax seal strips, black short mantle attached to one shoulder and upper back, short spear as secondary weapon, iron gate command token, carved back-carapace rank marks, and a small physical white-wing-over-black-sun plaque copied from the locked emblem style; 2) blades-deployed combat state, lower forward lunge, folding forearm blades opened like mantis blade-limbs, old iron hinge bands, reverse-jointed legs braced for speed, short spear secondary, restrained dark-red blade scratches only; 3) border snowline patrol state, same insect body and harness under blackstone and snowline frost, short mantle tightened, command belt, wax strips, rank plaque, iron token, reverse-jointed legs and claw feet still visible. Include silent detail panels with no text: stronger semi-anthropomorphic triangular command head with compressed brow ridge, nose-like chitin ridge, paired cheek planes, narrow jaw armor, dark compound eyes in near-human eye positions, bone-white mandible guard, antenna roots, carapace cheeks and dark neck membrane; folded and deployed forearm blade mechanism; old iron harness and dark-green command belt; back carapace rank marks with small locked-emblem plaque; short spear and iron gate token; reverse-jointed leg and claw foot; and a material swatch strip for black-green carapace, old iron, bone-white insect wax, dark-green belt cloth, black mantle, restrained dark-red blade mark, and blackstone snow. Keep the image as a production reference board with clean readable arrangement but no visible labels, no captions, no typography, no UI, no watermark. Tactile realistic chitin, iron, wax, frost, and blackstone; restrained cinematic lighting; low-magic eastern epic; not glossy sci-fi, not high fantasy.
prompts.negative_prompt: human general, humanoid warrior, man in black-green armor, armored human, helmeted soldier, knight armor, samurai armor, martial arts villain robe, pure unreadable insect monster head, ordinary mantis monster face, rank-and-file bug soldier face, fully human face, ordinary human face, human skin, human eyes with sclera or iris, human lips, human teeth, human nostrils, human hair, human boots, full human robe, complete human cloak, human hands holding dual swords, handheld dual swords replacing blade limbs, normal human legs, mecha insect, cyberpunk, sci-fi armor, generic monster, gore, blood-covered horror, oversized magic aura, spell circle, high fantasy summon, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect logo, new personal crest, large banner badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art
